pattern: Cars that would eventually leave the road untouched never contribute a collision, so trimming both ends down to only the cars destined to be involved turns simulation into a single linear scan.
hints: Think about which cars can possibly finish without ever touching another car -- a car moving left with nothing but empty road to its left, or one moving right with nothing but empty road to its right, never collides.

Strip away any leading cars moving left and any trailing cars moving right -- none of them can ever be hit, since everyone else is either moving away from them or destined to stop before reaching them.
Every car left after that trimming will be involved in at least one collision except the ones already marked stationary, so count how many of the remaining characters are not the stationary marker.

edge_inputs.description: single car moving right, minimum length
opposite-moving pair that diverges and never collides
opposite-moving pair that collides head on
a stationary car followed by one moving further away from it
a car moving away then a stationary car it never reaches
two right-movers pile into a stationary car
mixed cluster with cars stopping and causing further collisions

stress.description: a long random mix of left, right, and stationary cars at the constraint maximum length
